Arthroscopy & Spine Surgeries + About Us Trusted Orthopedics Care in Marol, Mumbai Welcome to Medicare Hospital, the leading orthopedic hospital in Marol, Mumbai. We specialize in comprehensive treatment for bone, joint, and muscle conditions. Our facilities include advanced diagnostic services such as ultrasound and digital X-ray, ensuring accurate diagnoses for tailored treatment plans. With a team of experienced specialists in orthopedic surgery, supported by super specialties including urology, physiotherapy, and cardiology, we provide comprehensive care from diagnosis to recovery. 1 + Years of Trust 1 + Google Reviews 1 ★ Google Ratings Our Treatments Conditions Treated & Surgeries Medicare Hospital is one stop healthcare provider for all your needs.
